Name: Control Winds
Optional/Variant Classes: Druid (PHB'14), Druid (PHB'24), Sorcerer (PHB'14), Sorcerer (PHB'24), Wizard (PHB'14), Wizard (PHB'24)
Text:
You take control of the air in a 100-foot cube that you can see within Alcance. Choose one of the following effects when you cast the spell. The effect lasts for the spell's Duracion, unless you use your action on a later turn to switch to a different effect. You can also use your action to temporarily halt the effect or to restart one you've halted.

Gusts. A wind picks up within the cube, continually blowing in a horizontal direction you designate. You choose the intensity of the wind: calm, moderate, or strong. If the wind is moderate or strong, ranged arma attacks that pass through it or that are made against targets within the cube have disadvantage on their attack rolls. If the wind is strong, any creature moving against the wind must spend 1 extra foot of movement for each foot moved.

Downdraft. You cause a sustained blast of strong wind to blow downward from the top of the cube. Ranged arma attacks that pass through the cube or that are made against targets within it have disadvantage on their attack rolls. A creature must make a Strength tirada de salvacion if it flies into the cube for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there flying. On a failed save, the creature is knocked derribado.

Updraft. You cause a sustained updraft within the cube, rising upward from the cube's bottom side. Creatures that end a fall within the cube take only half dano from the fall. When a creature in the cube makes a vertical jump, the creature can jump up to 10 pies higher than normal.

Name: Cordon of Arrows
Components: V, S, M (four or more arrows or bolts)
Text:
You plant four pieces of nonmagical ammunition—arrows or crossbow bolts—in the ground within Alcance and lay magic upon them to protect an area. Until the spell ends, whenever a creature other than you comes within 30 pies of the ammunition for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there, one piece of ammunition flies up to strike it. The creature debe superar a Dexterity tirada de salvacion or take 1d6 piercing dano. The piece of ammunition is then destroyed. The spell ends when no ammunition remains.

When you cast this spell, you can designate any creatures you choose, and the spell ignores them.
At Higher Levels: A niveles superiores. When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 3rd level or higher, the amount of ammunition that can be affected increases by two for each slot level above 2nd.

Name: Cordon of Arrows
Components: V, S, M (four or more arrows or bolts)
Text:
You touch up to four nonmagical Arrows or Bolts and plant them in the ground in your space. Until the spell ends, the ammunition can't be physically uprooted, and whenever a creature other than you enters a space within 30 pies of the ammunition for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there, one piece of ammunition flies up to strike it. The creature debe superar a Dexterity tirada de salvacion or take 2d4 Piercing dano. The piece of ammunition is then destroyed. The spell ends when none of the ammunition remains planted in the ground.

When you cast this spell, you can designate any creatures you choose, and the spell ignores them.
At Higher Levels: Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. The amount of ammunition that can be affected increases by two for each spell slot level above 2.

Name: Counterspell
Subclasses: Abjurer (PHB'24) Wizard, Arcane Trickster (PHB'24) Rogue, Arcane Trickster (PHB'14) Rogue, Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Eldritch Knight (PHB'24) Fighter, Eldritch Knight (PHB'14) Fighter, Redemption (XGE) Paladin, Redemption (XGE) Paladin, Watchers (TCE) Paladin, Watchers (TCE) Paladin
Text: You attempt to interrupt a creature in the process of casting a spell. If the creature is casting a spell of 3rd level or lower, its spell fails and has no effect. If it is casting a spell of 4th level or higher, make an ability check using your spellcasting ability. The DC equals 10 + the spell's level. On a success, the creature's spell fails and has no effect.
At Higher Levels: A niveles superiores. When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 4th level or higher, the interrupted spell has no effect if its level is less than or equal to the level of the spell slot you used.

Name: Counterspell
Subclasses: Abjurer (PHB'24) Wizard, Arcane Trickster (PHB'24) Rogue, Arcane Trickster (PHB'14) Rogue, Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Eldritch Knight (PHB'24) Fighter, Eldritch Knight (PHB'14) Fighter, Redemption (XGE) Paladin, Redemption (XGE) Paladin, Watchers (TCE) Paladin, Watchers (TCE) Paladin, Spellfire (FRHoF) Sorcerer
Text: You attempt to interrupt a creature in the process of casting a spell. The creature makes a Constitution tirada de salvacion. On a failed save, the spell dissipates with no effect, and the action, Bonus Action, or Reaction used to cast it is wasted. If that spell was cast with a spell slot, the slot isn't expended.

Name: Create Bonfire
Optional/Variant Classes: Artificer (TCE), Artificer (EFA), Druid (PHB'14), Druid (PHB'24), Sorcerer (PHB'14), Sorcerer (PHB'24), Warlock (PHB'14), Warlock (PHB'24), Wizard (PHB'14), Wizard (PHB'24)
Subclasses: Arcana (SCAG) Cleric, Arcana (SCAG) Cleric, Arcane Trickster (PHB'24) Rogue, Arcane Trickster (PHB'14) Rogue, Land (PHB'14) Druid, Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Moon (FRHoF) Bard, Eldritch Knight (PHB'24) Fighter, Eldritch Knight (PHB'14) Fighter, Nature (PHB'14) Cleric, Nature (PHB'14) Cleric, Strength (PSA) (PSA) Cleric, Strength (PSA) (PSA) Cleric
Text:
You create a bonfire on ground that you can see within Alcance. Until the spell ends, the magic bonfire fills a 5-foot cube. Any creature in the bonfire's space when you cast the spell debe superar a Dexterity tirada de salvacion or take 1d8 fire dano. A creature must also make the tirada de salvacion when it moves into the bonfire's space for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there.

The bonfire ignites flammable objects in its area that aren't being worn or carried.

The spell's dano increases by 1d8 when you reach 5th level (2d8), 11th level (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

Name: Create Food and Water
Subclasses: Land (Desert) (PHB'14) Druid, Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Genie (TCE) Warlock, Genie (TCE) Warlock
Text: You create 45 pounds of food and 30 gallons of water on the ground or in containers within Alcance, enough to sustain up to fifteen humanoids or five steeds for 24 hours. The food is bland but nourishing, and spoils if uneaten after 24 hours. The water is clean and doesn't go bad.

Name: Create Food and Water
Subclasses: Land (Desert) (PHB'14) Druid, Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Genie (TCE) Warlock, Genie (TCE) Warlock
Text: You create 45 pounds of food and 30 gallons of fresh water on the ground or in containers within Alcance—both useful in fending off the hazards of malnutrition and dehydration. The food is bland but nourishing and looks like a food of your choice, and the water is clean. The food spoils after 24 hours if uneaten.

Name: Create Homunculus
Components: V, S, M (clay, ash, and mandrake root, all of which the spell consumes, and a jewel-encrusted dagger worth at least 1,000 gp)
Subclasses: Arcana (SCAG) Cleric, Arcana (SCAG) Cleric
Text:
While speaking an intricate incantation, you cut yourself with a jewel-encrusted dagger, taking 2d4 piercing dano that can't be reduced in any way. You then drip your blood on the spell's other Componentes and touch them, transforming them into a special Constructo called a homunculus.

The statistics of the homunculus are in the Monster Manual. It is your faithful companion, and it dies if you die. Whenever you finish a descanso largo, you can spend up to half your Hit Dice if the homunculus is on the same plane of existence as you. When you do so, roll each die and add your Constitution modifier to it. Your hit point maximum is reduced by the total, and the homunculus's hit point maximum and current puntos de golpe are both increased by it. This process can reduce you to no lower than 1 hit point, and the change to your and the homunculus's puntos de golpe ends when you finish your next descanso largo. The reduction to your hit point maximum can't be removed by any means before then, except by the homunculus's death.

You can have only one homunculus at a time. If you cast this spell while your homunculus lives, the spell fails.

Name: Create Magen
Components: V, S, M (a vial of quicksilver worth 500 gp and a life-sized human doll, both of which the spell consumes, and an intricate crystal vara worth at least 1,500 gp that is not consumed)
Subclasses: Arcana (SCAG) Cleric, Arcana (SCAG) Cleric
Text:
While casting the spell, you place a vial of quicksilver in the chest of a life-sized human doll stuffed with ash or dust. You then stitch up the doll and drip your blood on it. At the end of the casting, you tap the doll with a crystal vara, transforming it into a magen clothed in whatever the doll was wearing. The type of magen is chosen by you during the casting of the spell. See appendix C for different kinds of magen and their statistics.

When the magen appears, your hit point maximum decreases by an amount equal to the magen's challenge rating (minimum reduction of 1). Only a wish spell can undo this reduction to your hit point maximum.

Any magen you create with this spell obeys your commands without question.

Name: Create Spelljamming Helm
Components: V, S, M (a crystal vara worth at least 5,000 gp, which the spell consumes)
Text: Holding the vara used in the casting of the spell, you touch a Grande or smaller chair that is unoccupied. The vara disappears, and the chair is transformed into a spelljamming helm.

Name: Create No muerto
Components: V, S, M (one clay pot filled with grave dirt, one clay pot filled with brackish water, and one 150 gp black onyx stone for each corpse)
Subclasses: Arcana (SCAG) Cleric, Arcana (SCAG) Cleric, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer
Text:
You can cast this spell only at night. Choose up to three corpses of Mediano or Pequeno humanoids within Alcance. Each corpse becomes a ghoul under your control. (The DM has game statistics for these creatures.)

As a bonus action on each of your turns, you can mentally command any creature you animated with this spell if the creature is within 120 pies of you (if you control multiple creatures, you can command any or all of them at the same time, issuing the same command to each one). You decide what action the creature will take and where it will move during its next turn, or you can issue a general command, such as to guard a particular chamber or corridor. If you issue no commands, the creature only defends itself against hostile creatures. Once given an order, the creature continues to follow it until its task is complete.

The creature is under your control for 24 hours, after which it stops obeying any command you have given it. To maintain control of the creature for another 24 hours, you must cast this spell on the creature before the current 24-hour period ends. This use of the spell reasserts your control over up to three creatures you have animated with this spell, rather than animating new ones.
At Higher Levels: A niveles superiores. When you cast this spell using a 7th-level spell slot, you can animate or reassert control over four ghouls. When you cast this spell using an 8th-level spell slot, you can animate or reassert control over five ghouls or two ghasts or wights. When you cast this spell using a 9th-level spell slot, you can animate or reassert control over six ghouls, three ghasts or wights, or two mummies.

Name: Create No muerto
Components: V, S, M (one 150+ GP black onyx stone for each corpse)
Subclasses: Arcana (SCAG) Cleric, Arcana (SCAG) Cleric, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer
Text:
You can cast this spell only at night. Choose up to three corpses of Mediano or Pequeno Humanoids within Alcance. Each one becomes a Ghoul under your control (see the Monster Manual for its stat block).

As a Bonus Action on each of your turns, you can mentally command any creature you animated with this spell if the creature is within 120 pies of you (if you control multiple creatures, you can command any of them at the same time, issuing the same command to them). You decide what action the creature will take and where it will move on its next turn, or you can issue a general command, such as to guard a particular place. If you issue no commands, the creature recibe the Dodge action and moves only to avoid harm. Once given an order, the creature continues to follow the order until its task is complete.

The creature is under your control for 24 hours, after which it stops obeying any command you've given it. To maintain control of the creature for another 24 hours, you must cast this spell on the creature before the current 24-hour period ends. This use of the spell reasserts your control over up to three creatures you have animated with this spell rather than animating new ones.
At Higher Levels: Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. If you use a level 7 spell slot, you can animate or reassert control over four Ghouls. If you use a level 8 spell slot, you can animate or reassert control over five Ghouls or two Ghasts or Wights. If you use a level 9 spell slot, you can animate or reassert control over six Ghouls, three Ghasts or Wights, or two Mummies. See the Monster Manual for these stat blocks.

Name: Create or Destroy Water
Components: V, S, M (a drop of water if creating water or a few grains of sand if destroying it)
Subclasses: Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Fathomless (TCE) Warlock, Fathomless (TCE) Warlock
Text:
You either create or destroy water.

Create Water. You create up to 10 gallons of clean water within Alcance in an open container. Alternatively, the water falls as rain in a 30-foot cube within Alcance, extinguishing exposed flames in the area.

Destroy Water. You destroy up to 10 gallons of water in an open container within Alcance. Alternatively, you destroy fog in a 30-foot cube within Alcance.
At Higher Levels: A niveles superiores. When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, you create or destroy 10 additional gallons of water, or the size of the cube increases by 5 pies, for each slot level above 1st.

Name: Create or Destroy Water
Components: V, S, M (a mix of water and sand)
Subclasses: Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Fathomless (TCE) Warlock, Fathomless (TCE) Warlock
Text:
You do one of the following:

Create Water. You create up to 10 gallons of clean water within Alcance in an open container. Alternatively, the water falls as rain in a 30-foot Cube within Alcance, extinguishing exposed flames there.

Destroy Water. You destroy up to 10 gallons of water in an open container within Alcance. Alternatively, you destroy fog in a 30-foot Cube within Alcance.
At Higher Levels: Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. You create or destroy 10 additional gallons of water, or the size of the Cube increases by 5 pies, for each spell slot level above 1.

Name: Creation
Components: V, S, M (a Diminuto piece of matter of the same type of the item you plan to create)
Subclasses: Forge (XGE) Cleric, Forge (XGE) Cleric, Illusionist (PHB'24) Wizard, Genie (TCE) Warlock, Genie (TCE) Warlock
Text:
You pull wisps of shadow material from the Shadowfell to create a nonliving object of vegetable matter within Alcance: soft goods, rope, wood, or something similar. You can also use this spell to create mineral objects such as stone, crystal, or metal. The object created must be no larger than a 5-foot cube, and the object must be of a form and material that you have seen before.

The Duracion depends on the object's material. If the object is composed of multiple materials, use the shortest Duracion.

CreationMaterialDurationVegetable matter1 dayStone or crystal12 hoursPrecious metals1 hourGems10 minutesAdamantine or mithral1 minuteUsing any material created by this spell as another spell's material component causes that spell to fail.
At Higher Levels: A niveles superiores. When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 6th level or higher, the cube increases by 5 pies for each slot level above 5th.

Name: Creation
Subclasses: Forge (XGE) Cleric, Forge (XGE) Cleric, Illusionist (PHB'24) Wizard, Genie (TCE) Warlock, Genie (TCE) Warlock
Text:
You pull wisps of shadow material from the Shadowfell to create an object within Alcance. It is either an object of vegetable matter (soft goods, rope, wood, and the like) or mineral matter (stone, crystal, metal, and the like). The object must be no larger than a 5-foot Cube, and the object must be of a form and material that you have seen.

The spell's Duracion depends on the object's material, as shown in the Materials table. If the object is composed of multiple materials, use the shortest Duracion. Using any object created by this spell as another spell's Material component causes the other spell to fail.

MaterialsMaterialDurationVegetable matter24 hoursStone or crystal12 hoursPrecious metals1 hourGems10 minutesAdamantine or mithral1 minute
At Higher Levels: Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. The Cube increases by 5 pies for each spell slot level above 5.

Name: Crown of Madness
Subclasses: Arcane Trickster (PHB'24) Rogue, Arcane Trickster (PHB'14) Rogue, Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Eldritch Knight (PHB'24) Fighter, Eldritch Knight (PHB'14) Fighter, Oathbreaker (DMG'14) Paladin, Oathbreaker (DMG'14) Paladin
Text:
One Humanoide of your choice that you can see within Alcance debe superar a Wisdom tirada de salvacion or become hechizado by you for the Duracion. While el objetivo is hechizado in this way, a twisted crown of jagged iron appears on its head, and a madness glows in its eyes.

The hechizado target must use its action before moving on each of its turns to make a melee attack against a creature other than itself that you mentally choose. el objetivo can act normally on its turn if you choose no creature or if none are within its reach.

On your subsequent turns, you must use your action to maintain control over el objetivo, or the spell ends. Also, el objetivo can make a Wisdom tirada de salvacion at the end of each of its turns. On a success, the spell ends.

Name: Crown of Madness
Subclasses: Arcane Trickster (PHB'24) Rogue, Arcane Trickster (PHB'14) Rogue, Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Eldritch Knight (PHB'24) Fighter, Eldritch Knight (PHB'14) Fighter, Oathbreaker (DMG'14) Paladin, Oathbreaker (DMG'14) Paladin
Text:
una criatura that you can see within Alcance debe superar a Wisdom tirada de salvacion or have the hechizado condition for the Duracion. The creature succeeds automatically if it isn't Humanoide.

A spectral crown appears on the hechizado target's head, and it must use its action before moving on each of its turns to make a melee attack against a creature other than itself that you mentally choose. el objetivo can act normally on its turn if you choose no creature or if no creature is within its reach. el objetivo repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the spell on itself on a success.

On your later turns, you must take the Magic action to maintain control of el objetivo, or the spell ends.

Name: Crown of Stars
Optional/Variant Classes: Sorcerer (PHB'14), Sorcerer (PHB'24), Warlock (PHB'14), Warlock (PHB'24), Wizard (PHB'14), Wizard (PHB'24)
Subclasses: Arcana (SCAG) Cleric, Arcana (SCAG) Cleric, Evoker (PHB'24) Wizard
Text:
Seven star-like motes of light appear and orbit your head until the spell ends. You can use a bonus action to send one of the motes streaking toward una criatura or object within 120 pies of you. When you do so, make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, el objetivo recibe 4d12 radiant dano. Whether you hit or miss, the mote is expended. The spell ends early if you expend the last mote.

If you have four or more motes remaining, they shed bright light in a 30-foot radius and dim light for an additional 30 pies. If you have one to three motes remaining, they shed dim light in a 30-foot radius.
At Higher Levels: A niveles superiores. When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 8th level or higher, the number of motes created increases by two for each slot level above 7th.

Name: Crusader's Mantle
Subclasses: War (PHB'14) Cleric, Solidarity (PSA) (PSA) Cleric, Solidarity (PSA) (PSA) Cleric
Text: Holy power radiates from you in an aura with a 30-foot radius, awakening boldness in friendly creatures. Until the spell ends, the aura moves with you, centered on you. While in the aura, each nonhostile creature in the aura (including you) deals an extra 1d4 radiant dano when it hits with a arma attack.

Name: Crusader's Mantle
Subclasses: War (PHB'14) Cleric, War (PHB'24) Cleric, Solidarity (PSA) (PSA) Cleric, Solidarity (PSA) (PSA) Cleric
Text: You radiate a magical aura in a 30-foot Emanation. While in the aura, you and your allies each deal an extra 1d4 Radiant dano when hitting with a arma or an Unarmed Strike.

Name: Cure Wounds
Classes: Artificer (TCE), Bard (PHB'14), Cleric (PHB'14), Druid (PHB'14), Paladin (PHB'14), Ranger (PHB'14)
Subclasses: Wildfire (TCE) Druid, Wildfire (TCE) Druid, Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Life (PHB'14) Cleric, Celestial (XGE) Warlock
Text: A creature you touch regains a number of puntos de golpe equal to 1d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier. This spell has no effect on No muerto or constructs.
At Higher Levels: A niveles superiores. When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, the healing increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 1st.

Name: Cure Wounds
Classes: Artificer (EFA), Bard (PHB'24), Cleric (PHB'24), Druid (PHB'24), Paladin (PHB'24), Ranger (PHB'24)
Subclasses: Celestial (PHB'24) Warlock, Wildfire (TCE) Druid, Wildfire (TCE) Druid, Moon (PHB'24) Druid, Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Life (PHB'24) Cleric, Life (PHB'14) Cleric, Spellfire (FRHoF) Sorcerer, Celestial (XGE) Warlock
Text: A creature you touch regains a number of puntos de golpe equal to 2d8 plus your spellcasting ability modifier.
At Higher Levels: Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. The healing increases by 2d8 for each spell slot level above 1.

Name: Dancing Lights
Components: V, S, M (a bit of phosphorus or wychwood, or a glowworm)
Subclasses: Arcana (SCAG) Cleric, Arcana (SCAG) Cleric, Arcane Trickster (PHB'24) Rogue, Arcane Trickster (PHB'14) Rogue, Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Eldritch Knight (PHB'24) Fighter, Eldritch Knight (PHB'14) Fighter, Evoker (PHB'24) Wizard
Text:
You create up to four torch-sized lights within Alcance, making them appear as torches, lanterns, or glowing orbs that hover in the air for the Duracion. You can also combine the four lights into one glowing vaguely Humanoide form of Mediano size. Whichever form you choose, each light sheds dim light in a 10-foot radius.

As a bonus action on your turn, you can move the lights up to 60 pies to a new spot within Alcance. A light must be within 20 pies of another light created by this spell, and a light winks out if it exceeds the spell's Alcance.

Name: Dancing Lights
Components: V, S, M (a bit of phosphorus)
Subclasses: Arcana (SCAG) Cleric, Arcana (SCAG) Cleric, Arcane Trickster (PHB'24) Rogue, Arcane Trickster (PHB'14) Rogue, Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Eldritch Knight (PHB'24) Fighter, Eldritch Knight (PHB'14) Fighter, Illusionist (PHB'24) Wizard
Text:
You create up to four torch-size lights within Alcance, making them appear as torches, lanterns, or glowing orbs that hover for the Duracion. Alternatively, you combine the four lights into one glowing Mediano form that is vaguely humanlike. Whichever form you choose, each light sheds Dim Light in a 10-foot radius.

As a Bonus Action, you can move the lights up to 60 pies to a space within Alcance. A light must be within 20 pies of another light created by this spell, and a light vanishes if it exceeds the spell's Alcance.

Name: Danse Macabre
Text:
Threads of dark power leap from your fingers to pierce up to five Pequeno or Mediano corpses you can see within Alcance. Each corpse immediately stands up and becomes No muerto. You decide whether it is a zombie or a skeleton (the statistics for zombies and skeletons are in the Monster Manual), and it gains a bonus to its attack and dano rolls equal to your spellcasting ability modifier.

You can use a bonus action to mentally command the creatures you make with this spell, issuing the same command to all of them. To receive the command, a creature must be within 60 pies of you. You decide what action the creatures will take and where they will move during their next turn, or you can issue a general command, such as to guard a chamber or passageway against your foes. If you issue no commands, the creatures do nothing except defend themselves against hostile creatures. Once given an order, the creatures continue to follow it until their task is complete.

The creatures are under your control until the spell ends, after which they become inanimate once more.
At Higher Levels: A niveles superiores. When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 6th level or higher, you animate up to two additional corpses for each slot level above 5th.

Name: Dark Star
Components: V, S, M (a shard of onyx and a drop of the caster's blood, both of which the spell consumes)
Subclasses: Chronurgy (EGW) Wizard, Chronurgy (EGW) Wizard, Graviturgy (EGW) Wizard, Graviturgy (EGW) Wizard
Text:
This spell creates a sphere centered on a point you choose within Alcance. The sphere can have a radius of up to 40 pies. The area within this sphere is filled with magical darkness and crushing gravitational force.

For the Duracion, the spell's area is difficult terrain. A creature with Vision en la oscuridad can't see through the magical darkness, and nonmagical light can't illuminate it. No sound can be created within or pass through the area. Any creature or object entirely inside the sphere is immune to thunder dano, and creatures are ensordecido while entirely inside it. Casting a spell that includes a verbal component is impossible there.

Any creature that enters the spell's area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there must make a Constitution tirada de salvacion. The creature recibe 8d10 force dano on a failed save, or half as much dano on a successful one. A creature reduced to 0 puntos de golpe by this dano is disintegrated. A disintegrated creature and everything it is wearing and carrying, except magic items, are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust.

Name: Darkness
Components: V, M (bat fur and a drop of pitch or piece of coal)
Subclasses: Arcane Trickster (PHB'24) Rogue, Arcane Trickster (PHB'14) Rogue, Land (Swamp) (PHB'14) Druid, Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Eldritch Knight (PHB'24) Fighter, Eldritch Knight (PHB'14) Fighter, Evoker (PHB'24) Wizard, Oathbreaker (DMG'14) Paladin, Oathbreaker (DMG'14) Paladin, Shadow (XGE) Sorcerer, Shadow (XGE) Sorcerer, Shadow (PHB'14) Monk
Text:
Magical darkness spreads from a point you choose within Alcance to fill a 15-foot-radius sphere for the Duracion. The darkness spreads around corners. A creature with Vision en la oscuridad can't see through this darkness, and nonmagical light can't illuminate it.

If the point you choose is on an object you are holding or one that isn't being worn or carried, the darkness emanates from the object and moves with it. Completely covering the source of the darkness with an opaque object, such as a bowl or a helm, blocks the darkness.

If any of this spell's area overlaps with an area of light created by a spell of 2nd level or lower, the spell that created the light is dispelled.

Name: Darkness
Components: V, M (bat fur and a piece of coal)
Subclasses: Arcane Trickster (PHB'24) Rogue, Arcane Trickster (PHB'14) Rogue, Land (Swamp) (PHB'14) Druid, Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Eldritch Knight (PHB'24) Fighter, Eldritch Knight (PHB'14) Fighter, Evoker (PHB'24) Wizard, Oathbreaker (DMG'14) Paladin, Oathbreaker (DMG'14) Paladin, Shadow (XGE) Sorcerer, Shadow (XGE) Sorcerer, Shadow (PHB'24) Monk, Shadow (PHB'14) Monk
Text:
For the Duracion, magical Darkness spreads from a point within Alcance and fills a 15-foot-radius Sphere. Vision en la oscuridad can't see through it, and nonmagical light can't illuminate it.

Alternatively, you cast the spell on an object that isn't being worn or carried, causing the Darkness to fill a 15-foot Emanation originating from that object. Covering that object with something opaque, such as a bowl or helm, blocks the Darkness.

If any of this spell's area overlaps with an area of Bright Light or Dim Light created by a spell of level 2 or lower, that other spell is dispelled.

Name: Vision en la oscuridad
Components: V, S, M (either a pinch of dried carrot or an agate)
Subclasses: Arcane Trickster (PHB'24) Rogue, Arcane Trickster (PHB'14) Rogue, Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Eldritch Knight (PHB'24) Fighter, Eldritch Knight (PHB'14) Fighter, Shadow (PHB'14) Monk
Text: You touch a willing creature to grant it the ability to see in the dark. For the Duracion, that creature has Vision en la oscuridad out to a Alcance of 60 pies.

Name: Vision en la oscuridad
Subclasses: Arcane Trickster (PHB'24) Rogue, Arcane Trickster (PHB'14) Rogue, Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Eldritch Knight (PHB'24) Fighter, Eldritch Knight (PHB'14) Fighter, Shadow (PHB'14) Monk
Text: For the Duracion, a willing creature you touch has Vision en la oscuridad with a Alcance of 150 pies.

Name: Dawn
Components: V, S, M (a sunburst pendant worth at least 100 gp)
Subclasses: Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Evoker (PHB'24) Wizard
Text:
The light of dawn shines down on a location you specify within Alcance. Until the spell ends, a 30-foot-radius, 40-foot-high cylinder of bright light glimmers there. This light is sunlight.

When the cylinder appears, cada criatura in it must make a Constitution tirada de salvacion, taking 4d10 radiant dano on a failed save, or half as much dano on a successful one. A creature must also make this tirada de salvacion whenever it ends its turn in the cylinder.

If you're within 60 pies of the cylinder, you can move it up to 60 pies as a bonus action on your turn.

Name: Daylight
Subclasses: Land (Grassland) (PHB'14) Druid, Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Light (PHB'14) Cleric, Celestial (XGE) Warlock
Text:
A 60-foot-radius sphere of light spreads out from a point you choose within Alcance. The sphere is bright light and sheds dim light for an additional 60 pies.

If you chose a point on an object you are holding or one that isn't being worn or carried, the light shines from the object and moves with it. Completely covering the affected object with an opaque object, such as a bowl or a helm, blocks the light.

If any of this spell's area overlaps with an area of darkness created by a spell of 3rd level or lower, the spell that created the darkness is dispelled.

Name: Daylight
Subclasses: Celestial (PHB'24) Warlock, Land (Grassland) (PHB'14) Druid, Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Light (PHB'24) Cleric, Light (PHB'14) Cleric, Celestial (XGE) Warlock
Text:
For the Duracion, sunlight spreads from a point within Alcance and fills a 60-foot-radius Sphere. The sunlight's area is Bright Light and sheds Dim Light for an additional 60 pies.

Alternatively, you cast the spell on an object that isn't being worn or carried, causing the sunlight to fill a 60-foot Emanation originating from that object. Covering that object with something opaque, such as a bowl or helm, blocks the sunlight.

If any of this spell's area overlaps with an area of Darkness created by a spell of level 3 or lower, that other spell is dispelled.

Name: Death armadura
Components: V, S, M (an onyx worth 50+ GP, which the spell consumes)
Subclasses: Arcane Trickster (PHB'24) Rogue, Arcane Trickster (PHB'14) Rogue, Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Eldritch Knight (PHB'24) Fighter, Eldritch Knight (PHB'14) Fighter
Text: For the Duracion, an inky aura surrounds una criatura you touch. el objetivo has Advantage on Death Tiradas de salvacion, and once per turn, when a creature within 5 pies of el objetivo hits it with a melee attack roll, the attacker recibe 2d4 Necrotic dano.

Name: Death Ward
Subclasses: Alchemist (TCE) Artificer, Death (DMG'14) Cleric, Death (DMG'14) Cleric, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Grave (XGE) Cleric, Grave (XGE) Cleric, Life (PHB'14) Cleric, Lunar (DSotDQ) Sorcerer, Lunar (DSotDQ) Sorcerer, No muerto (VRGR) Warlock, No muerto (VRGR) Warlock, Undying (SCAG) Warlock, Undying (SCAG) Warlock, Ambition (PSA) (PSA) Cleric, Ambition (PSA) (PSA) Cleric
Text:
You touch a creature and grant it a measure of protection from death.

The first time el objetivo would drop to 0 puntos de golpe as a result of taking dano, el objetivo instead drops to 1 hit point, and the spell ends.

If the spell is still in effect when el objetivo is subjected to an effect that would kill it instantaneously without dealing dano, that effect is instead negated against el objetivo, and the spell ends.

Name: Death Ward
Subclasses: Alchemist (TCE) Artificer, Alchemist (EFA) Artificer, Death (DMG'14) Cleric, Death (DMG'14) Cleric, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Grave (XGE) Cleric, Grave (XGE) Cleric, Life (PHB'14) Cleric, Life (PHB'24) Cleric, Lunar (DSotDQ) Sorcerer, Lunar (DSotDQ) Sorcerer, No muerto (VRGR) Warlock, No muerto (VRGR) Warlock, Undying (SCAG) Warlock, Undying (SCAG) Warlock, Ambition (PSA) (PSA) Cleric, Ambition (PSA) (PSA) Cleric
Text:
You touch a creature and grant it a measure of protection from death. The first time el objetivo would drop to 0 puntos de golpe before the spell ends, el objetivo instead drops to 1 Hit Point, and the spell ends.

If the spell is still in effect when el objetivo is subjected to an effect that would kill it instantly without dealing dano, that effect is negated against el objetivo, and the spell ends.

Name: Delayed Blast Fireball
Components: V, S, M (a Diminuto ball of bat guano and sulfur)
Subclasses: Arcana (SCAG) Cleric, Arcana (SCAG) Cleric, Evoker (PHB'24) Wizard
Text:
A beam of yellow light flashes from your pointing finger, then condenses to linger at a chosen point within Alcance as a glowing bead for the Duracion. When the spell ends, either because your concentration is broken or because you decide to end it, the bead blossoms with a low roar into an explosion of flame that spreads around corners. cada criatura in a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on that point must make a Dexterity tirada de salvacion. A creature recibe fire dano equal to the total accumulated dano on a failed save, or half as much dano on a successful one.

The spell's base dano is 12d6. If at the end of your turn the bead has not yet detonated, the dano increases by 1d6.

If the glowing bead is touched before the interval has expired, the creature touching it must make a Dexterity tirada de salvacion. On a failed save, the spell ends immediately, causing the bead to erupt in flame. On a successful save, the creature can throw the bead up to 40 pies. When it strikes a creature or a solid object, the spell ends, and the bead explodes.

The fire damages objects in the area and ignites flammable objects that aren't being worn or carried.
At Higher Levels: A niveles superiores. When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 8th level or higher, the base dano increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 7th.

Name: Delayed Blast Fireball
Components: V, S, M (a ball of bat guano and sulfur)
Subclasses: Arcana (SCAG) Cleric, Arcana (SCAG) Cleric, Evoker (PHB'24) Wizard
Text:
A beam of yellow light flashes from you, then condenses at a chosen point within Alcance as a glowing bead for the Duracion. When the spell ends, the bead explodes, and cada criatura in a 20-foot-radius Sphere centered on that point makes a Dexterity tirada de salvacion. A creature recibe Fire dano equal to the total accumulated dano on a failed save or half as much dano on a successful one.

The spell's base dano is 12d6, and the dano increases by 1d6 whenever your turn ends and the spell hasn't ended.

If a creature touches the glowing bead before the spell ends, that creature makes a Dexterity tirada de salvacion. On a failed save, the spell ends, causing the bead to explode. On a successful save, the creature can throw the bead up to 40 pies. If the thrown bead enters a creature's space or collides with a solid object, the spell ends, and the bead explodes.

When the bead explodes, flammable objects in the explosion that aren't being worn or carried start burning.
At Higher Levels: Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. The base dano increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 7.

Name: Demiplane
Subclasses: Arcana (SCAG) Cleric, Arcana (SCAG) Cleric
Text:
You create a shadowy door on a flat solid surface that you can see within Alcance. The door is Grande enough to allow Mediano creatures to pass through unhindered. When opened, the door leads to a demiplane that appears to be an empty room 30 pies in each dimension, made of wood or stone. When the spell ends, the door disappears, and any creatures or objects inside the demiplane remain trapped there, as the door also disappears from the other side.

Each time you cast this spell, you can create a new demiplane, or have the shadowy door connect to a demiplane you created with a previous casting of this spell. Additionally, if you know the nature and contents of a demiplane created by a casting of this spell by another creature, you can have the shadowy door connect to its demiplane instead.

Name: Demiplane
Subclasses: Arcana (SCAG) Cleric, Arcana (SCAG) Cleric
Text:
You create a shadowy Mediano door on a flat solid surface that you can see within Alcance. This door can be opened and closed, and it leads to a demiplane that is an empty room 30 pies in each dimension, made of wood or stone (your choice).

When the spell ends, the door vanishes, and any objects inside the demiplane remain there. Any creatures inside also remain unless they opt to be shunted through the door as it vanishes, landing with the derribado condition in the unoccupied spaces closest to the door's former space.

Each time you cast this spell, you can create a new demiplane or connect the shadowy door to a demiplane you created with a previous casting of this spell. Additionally, if you know the nature and contents of a demiplane created by a casting of this spell by another creature, you can connect the shadowy door to that demiplane instead.

Name: Deryan's Helpful Homunculi
Components: V, S, M (powdered gemstones worth 100+ GP, which the spell consumes, and one set of Artisan's Tools with which you have proficiency)
Subclasses: Arcane Trickster (PHB'24) Rogue, Arcane Trickster (PHB'14) Rogue, Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Eldritch Knight (PHB'24) Fighter, Eldritch Knight (PHB'14) Fighter
Text:
You summon a group of helpful spirits, which lasts for the Duracion. The spirits appear as homunculi or as another Constructo of your choice but are intangible and invulnerable, and they are considered to have proficiency in the Arcana skill and with the set of Artisan's Tools used in the spell's casting.

If you are crafting an item, the spirits function as a single assistant for your crafting, halving the crafting time.

Name: Destructive Wave
Subclasses: Tempest (PHB'14) Cleric, Tempest (PHB'14) Cleric, Strength (PSA) (PSA) Cleric, Strength (PSA) (PSA) Cleric, Zeal (PSA) (PSA) Cleric, Zeal (PSA) (PSA) Cleric
Text: You strike the ground, creating a burst of divine energy that ripples outward from you. cada criatura you choose within 30 pies of you debe superar a Constitution tirada de salvacion or take 5d6 thunder dano, as well as 5d6 radiant or necrotic dano (your choice), and be knocked derribado. A creature that succeeds on its tirada de salvacion recibe half as much dano and isn't knocked derribado.

Name: Destructive Wave
Subclasses: Tempest (PHB'14) Cleric, Tempest (PHB'14) Cleric, Strength (PSA) (PSA) Cleric, Strength (PSA) (PSA) Cleric, Zeal (PSA) (PSA) Cleric, Zeal (PSA) (PSA) Cleric
Text: Destructive energy ripples outward from you in a 30-foot Emanation. cada criatura you choose in the Emanation makes a Constitution tirada de salvacion. On a failed save, a target recibe 5d6 Thunder dano and 5d6 Radiant or Necrotic dano (your choice) and has the derribado condition. On a successful save, a target recibe half as much dano only.

Name: Detect maligno and bueno
Subclasses: Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Genie (TCE) Warlock, Genie (TCE) Warlock
Text:
For the Duracion, you know if there is an Aberracion, Celestial, Elemental, Feerico, Infernal, or No muerto within 30 pies of you, as well as where the creature is located. Similarly, you know if there is a place or object within 30 pies of you that has been magically consecrated or desecrated.

The spell can penetrate most barriers, but it is blocked by 1 foot of stone, 1 inch of Comun metal, a thin sheet of lead, or 3 pies of wood or dirt.

Name: Detect maligno and bueno
Subclasses: Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Genie (TCE) Warlock, Genie (TCE) Warlock
Text:
For the Duracion, you sense the location of any Aberracion, Celestial, Elemental, Feerico, Infernal, or No muerto within 30 pies of yourself. You also sense whether the Hallow spell is active there and, if so, where.

The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; or a thin sheet of lead.

Name: Detect Magic
Classes: Artificer (TCE), Bard (PHB'14), Cleric (PHB'14), Druid (PHB'14), Paladin (PHB'14), Ranger (PHB'14), Sorcerer (PHB'14), Wizard (PHB'14)
Subclasses: Arcana (SCAG) Cleric, Arcana (SCAG) Cleric, Arcane Trickster (PHB'24) Rogue, Arcane Trickster (PHB'14) Rogue, Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Diviner (PHB'24) Wizard, Eldritch Knight (PHB'24) Fighter, Eldritch Knight (PHB'14) Fighter, Watchers (TCE) Paladin, Watchers (TCE) Paladin
Text:
For the Duracion, you sense the presence of magic within 30 pies of you. If you sense magic in this way, you can use your action to see a faint aura around any visible creature or object in the area that bears magic, and you learn its school of magic, if any.

The spell can penetrate most barriers, but it is blocked by 1 foot of stone, 1 inch of Comun metal, a thin sheet of lead, or 3 pies of wood or dirt.

Name: Detect Magic
Classes: Artificer (EFA), Bard (PHB'24), Cleric (PHB'24), Druid (PHB'24), Paladin (PHB'24), Ranger (PHB'24), Sorcerer (PHB'24), Warlock (PHB'24), Wizard (PHB'24)
Subclasses: Arcana (SCAG) Cleric, Arcana (SCAG) Cleric, Arcane Trickster (PHB'24) Rogue, Arcane Trickster (PHB'14) Rogue, Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Diviner (PHB'24) Wizard, Eldritch Knight (PHB'24) Fighter, Eldritch Knight (PHB'14) Fighter, Knowledge (FRHoF) Cleric, Watchers (TCE) Paladin, Watchers (TCE) Paladin
Text:
For the Duracion, you sense the presence of magical effects within 30 pies of yourself. If you sense such effects, you can take the Magic action to see a faint aura around any visible creature or object in the area that bears the magic, and if an effect was created by a spell, you learn the spell's school of magic.

The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; or a thin sheet of lead.

Name: Detect Poison and Disease
Subclasses: Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer
Text:
For the Duracion, you can sense the presence and location of poisons, poisonous creatures, and diseases within 30 pies of you. You also identify the kind of poison, poisonous creature, or disease in each case.

The spell can penetrate most barriers, but it is blocked by 1 foot of stone, 1 inch of Comun metal, a thin sheet of lead, or 3 pies of wood or dirt.

Name: Detect Poison and Disease
Subclasses: Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer
Text:
For the Duracion, you sense the location of poisons, poisonous or venomous creatures, and magical contagions within 30 pies of yourself. You sense the kind of poison, creature, or contagion in each case.

The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; or a thin sheet of lead.

Name: Detect Thoughts
Subclasses: Aberrant Mind (TCE) Sorcerer, Arcane Trickster (PHB'24) Rogue, Arcane Trickster (PHB'14) Rogue, Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Diviner (PHB'24) Wizard, Eldritch Knight (PHB'24) Fighter, Eldritch Knight (PHB'14) Fighter, Great Old One (PHB'14) Warlock
Text:
For the Duracion, you can read the thoughts of certain creatures. When you cast the spell and as your action on each turn until the spell ends, you can focus your mind on any una criatura that you can see within 30 pies of you. If the creature you choose has an Intelligence of 3 or lower or doesn't speak cualquier idioma, the creature is unaffected.

You initially learn the surface thoughts of the creature—what is most on its mind in that moment. As an action, you can either shift your attention to another creature's thoughts or attempt to probe deeper into the same creature's mind. If you probe deeper, el objetivo must make a Wisdom tirada de salvacion. If it fails, you gain insight into its reasoning (if any), its emotional state, and something that looms Grande in its mind (such as something it worries over, loves, or hates). If it succeeds, the spell ends. Either way, el objetivo knows that you are probing into its mind, and unless you shift your attention to another creature's thoughts, the creature can use its action on its turn to make an Intelligence check contested by your Intelligence check; if it succeeds, the spell ends.

Questions verbally directed at el objetivo creature naturally shape the course of its thoughts, so this spell is particularly effective as part of an interrogation.

You can also use this spell to detect the presence of thinking creatures you can't see. When you cast the spell or as your action during the Duracion, you can search for thoughts within 30 pies of you. The spell can penetrate barriers, but 2 pies of rock, 2 inches of any metal other than lead, or a thin sheet of lead blocks you. You can't detect a creature with an Intelligence of 3 or lower or one that doesn't speak cualquier idioma.

Once you detect the presence of a creature in this way, you can read its thoughts for the rest of the Duracion as described above, even if you can't see it, but it must still be within Alcance.

Name: Detect Thoughts
Subclasses: Aberrant Mind (TCE) Sorcerer, Aberrant (PHB'24) Sorcerer, Arcane Trickster (PHB'24) Rogue, Arcane Trickster (PHB'14) Rogue, Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Diviner (PHB'24) Wizard, Eldritch Knight (PHB'24) Fighter, Eldritch Knight (PHB'14) Fighter, Great Old One (PHB'24) Warlock, Knowledge (FRHoF) Cleric, Great Old One (PHB'14) Warlock
Text:
You activate one of the effects below. Until the spell ends, you can activate either effect as a Magic action on your later turns.

Sense Thoughts. You sense the presence of thoughts within 30 pies of yourself that belong to creatures that know languages or are telepathic. You don't read the thoughts, but you know that a thinking creature is present.

The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; or a thin sheet of lead.

Read Thoughts. Target una criatura you can see within 30 pies of yourself or una criatura within 30 pies of yourself that you detected with the Sense Thoughts option. You learn what is most on el objetivo's mind right now. If el objetivo doesn't know cualquier idioma and isn't telepathic, you learn nothing.

As a Magic action on your next turn, you can try to probe deeper into el objetivo's mind. If you probe deeper, el objetivo makes a Wisdom tirada de salvacion. On a failed save, you discern el objetivo's reasoning, emotions, and something that looms Grande in its mind (such as a worry, love, or hate). On a successful save, the spell ends. Either way, el objetivo knows that you are probing into its mind, and until you shift your attention away from el objetivo's mind, el objetivo can take an action on its turn to make an Intelligence (Arcana) check against your CD de salvacion de conjuros, ending the spell on a success.

Name: Dimension Door
Subclasses: Arcane Trickster (PHB'14) Rogue, Arcane Trickster (PHB'24) Rogue, Eldritch Knight (PHB'14) Fighter, Eldritch Knight (PHB'24) Fighter, Feerico Wanderer (TCE) Ranger, Vengeance (PHB'14) Paladin, Trickery (PHB'14) Cleric, Ambition (PSA) (PSA) Cleric, Ambition (PSA) (PSA) Cleric
Text:
You teleport yourself from your current location to any other spot within Alcance. You arrive at exactly the spot desired. It can be a place you can see, one you can visualize, or one you can describe by stating distance and direction, such as "200 pies straight downward" or "upward to the northwest at a 45-degree angle, 300 pies."

You can bring along objects as long as their weight doesn't exceed what you can carry. You can also bring one willing creature of your size or smaller who is carrying gear up to its carrying capacity. The creature must be within 5 pies of you when you cast this spell.

If you would arrive in a place already occupied by an object or a creature, you and any creature traveling with you each take 4d6 force dano, and the spell fails to teleport you.

Name: Dimension Door
Subclasses: Arcane Trickster (PHB'14) Rogue, Arcane Trickster (PHB'24) Rogue, Eldritch Knight (PHB'14) Fighter, Eldritch Knight (PHB'24) Fighter, Feerico Wanderer (TCE) Ranger, Feerico Wanderer (PHB'24) Ranger, Vengeance (PHB'14) Paladin, Vengeance (PHB'24) Paladin, Trickery (PHB'14) Cleric, Trickery (PHB'24) Cleric, Ambition (PSA) (PSA) Cleric, Ambition (PSA) (PSA) Cleric
Text:
You teleport to a location within Alcance. You arrive at exactly the spot desired. It can be a place you can see, one you can visualize, or one you can describe by stating distance and direction, such as "200 pies straight downward" or "300 pies upward to the northwest at a 45-degree angle."

You can also teleport one willing creature. The creature must be within 5 pies of you when you teleport, and it teleports to a space within 5 pies of your destination space.

If you, the other creature, or both would arrive in a space occupied by a creature or completely filled by one or more objects, you and any creature traveling with you each take 4d6 Force dano, and the teleportation fails.

Name: Dirge
Subclasses: Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer
Text:
Deathly power fills a 60-foot Emanation originating from you for the Duracion.

When you cast this spell, you can designate creatures to be unaffected by it. Any other creature can't regain puntos de golpe while in the Emanation. Whenever the Emanation enters a creature's space and whenever a creature enters the Emanation or ends its turn there, the creature makes a Constitution tirada de salvacion. On a failed save, the creature recibe 3d10 Necrotic dano and has the derribado condition. On a successful save, the creature recibe half as much dano and its Speed is halved. Vista ciega. You have Vista ciega with a Alcance of 30 pies. Within that Alcance, you can effectively see anything that isn't behind total cover, even if you're cegado or in darkness. Moreover, you can see an invisible creature, unless the creature successfully hides from you.

Breath arma. When you cast this spell, and as a bonus action on subsequent turns for the Duracion, you can exhale shimmering energy in a 60-foot cone. cada criatura in that area must make a Dexterity tirada de salvacion, taking 6d8 force dano on a failed save, or half as much dano on a successful one.

Wings. Incorporeal wings sprout from your back, giving you a flying speed of 60 pies.

Name: Drawmij's Instant Summons
Components: V, S, M (a sapphire worth 1,000 gp)
Subclasses: Arcana (SCAG) Cleric, Arcana (SCAG) Cleric
Text:
You touch an object weighing 10 pounds or less whose longest dimension is 6 pies or less. The spell leaves an invisible mark on its surface and invisibly inscribes the name of the item on the sapphire you use as the material component. Each time you cast this spell, you must use a different sapphire.

At any time thereafter, you can use your action to speak the item's name and crush the sapphire. The item instantly appears in your hand regardless of physical or planar distances, and the spell ends.

If another creature is holding or carrying the item, crushing the sapphire doesn't transport the item to you, but instead you learn who the creature possessing the object is and roughly where that creature is located at that moment.

Dispel magic or a similar effect successfully applied to the sapphire ends this spell's effect.

Name: Drawmij's Instant Summons
Components: V, S, M (a sapphire worth 1,000+ GP)
Subclasses: Arcana (SCAG) Cleric, Arcana (SCAG) Cleric
Text:
You touch the sapphire used in the casting and an object weighing 10 pounds or less whose longest dimension is 6 pies or less. The spell leaves an invisible mark on that object and invisibly inscribes the object's name on the sapphire. Each time you cast this spell, you must use a different sapphire.

Thereafter, you can take a Magic action to speak the object's name and crush the sapphire. The object instantly appears in your hand regardless of physical or planar distances, and the spell ends.

If another creature is holding or carrying the object, crushing the sapphire doesn't transport it, but instead you learn who that creature is and where that creature is currently located.

Name: Dream
Components: V, S, M (a handful of sand, a dab of ink, and a writing quill plucked from a sleeping bird)
Subclasses: Land (Grassland) (PHB'14) Druid, Illusionist (PHB'24) Wizard
Text:
This spell shapes a creature's dreams. Choose a creature known to you as el objetivo of this spell. el objetivo must be on the same plane of existence as you. Creatures that don't sleep, such as elves, can't be contacted by this spell. You, or a willing creature you touch, enters a trance state, acting as a messenger. While in the trance, the messenger is aware of his or her surroundings, but can't take actions or move.

If el objetivo is asleep, the messenger appears in el objetivo's dreams and can converse with el objetivo as long as it remains asleep, through the Duracion of the spell. The messenger can also shape the environment of the dream, creating landscapes, objects, and other images. The messenger can emerge from the trance at any time, ending the effect of the spell early. el objetivo recalls the dream perfectly upon waking. If el objetivo is awake when you cast the spell, the messenger knows it, and can either end the trance (and the spell) or wait for el objetivo to fall asleep, at which point the messenger appears in el objetivo's dreams.

You can make the messenger appear monstrous and terrifying to el objetivo. If you do, the messenger can deliver a message of no more than ten words and then el objetivo must make a Wisdom tirada de salvacion. On a failed save, echoes of the phantasmal Monstruosidad spawn a nightmare that lasts the Duracion of el objetivo's sleep and prevents el objetivo from gaining any benefit from that rest. In addition, when el objetivo wakes up, it recibe 3d6 psychic dano.

If you have a body part, lock of hair, clipping from a nail, or similar portion of el objetivo's body, el objetivo makes its tirada de salvacion with disadvantage.

Subclasses: Land (Grassland) (PHB'14) Druid, Illusionist (PHB'24) Wizard

You target a creature you know on the same plane of existence. You or a willing creature you touch enters a trance state to act as a dream messenger. While in the trance, the messenger is incapacitado and has a Speed of 0.

The messenger can also shape the dream's environment, creating landscapes, objects, and other images. The messenger can emerge from the trance at any time, ending the spell. el objetivo recalls the dream perfectly upon waking.

Name: Dream of the Blue Veil
Components: V, S, M (a magic item or a willing creature from the destination world)
Optional/Variant Classes: Bard (PHB'14), Bard (PHB'24), Sorcerer (PHB'14), Sorcerer (PHB'24), Warlock (PHB'14), Warlock (PHB'24), Wizard (PHB'14), Wizard (PHB'24)
Subclasses: Arcana (SCAG) Cleric, Arcana (SCAG) Cleric
Text:
You and up to eight willing creatures within Alcance fall inconsciente for the spell's Duracion and experience visions of another world on the Material Plane, such as Oerth, Toril, Krynn, or Eberron. If the spell reaches its full Duracion, the visions conclude with each of you encountering and pulling back a mysterious blue curtain. The spell then ends with you mentally and physically transported to the world that was in the visions.

To cast this spell, you must have a magic item that originated on the world you wish to reach, and you must be aware of the world's existence, even if you don't know the world's name. Your destination in the other world is a safe location within 1 mile of where the magic item was created. Alternatively, you can cast the spell if one of the affected creatures was born on the other world, which causes your destination to be a safe location within 1 mile of where that creature was born.

The spell ends early on a creature if that creature recibe any dano, and the creature isn't transported. If you take any dano, the spell ends for you and all the other creatures, with none of you being transported.

Name: Druid Grove
Components: V, S, M (mistletoe, which the spell consumes, that was harvested with a golden sickle under the light of a full moon)
Text:
You invoke the spirits of nature to protect an area outdoors or underground. The area can be as Pequeno as a 30-foot cube or as Grande as a 90-foot cube. Buildings and other structures are excluded from the affected area. If you cast this spell in the same area every day for a year, the spell lasts until dispelled.

The spell creates the following effects within the area. When you cast this spell, you can specify creatures as friends who are immune to the effects. You can also specify a password that, when spoken aloud, makes the speaker immune to these effects.

The entire warded area radiates magic. A dispel magic cast on the area, if successful, removes only one of the following effects, not the entire area. That spell's caster chooses which effect to end. Only when all its effects are gone is this spell dispelled.

Solid Fog. You can fill any number of 5-foot squares on the ground with thick fog, making them heavily obscured. The fog reaches 10 pies high. In addition, every foot of movement through the fog costs 2 extra pies. To a creature immune to this effect, the fog obscures nothing and looks like soft mist, with motes of green light floating in the air.

Grasping Undergrowth. You can fill any number of 5-foot squares on the ground that aren't filled with fog with grasping weeds and vines, as if they were affected by an entangle spell. To a creature immune to this effect, the weeds and vines feel soft and reshape themselves to serve as temporary seats or beds.

Grove Guardians. You can animate up to four trees in the area, causing them to uproot themselves from the ground. These trees have the same statistics as an awakened tree, which appears in the Monster Manual, except they can't speak, and their bark is covered with druidic symbols. If any creature not immune to this effect enters the warded area, the grove guardians fight until they have driven off or slain the intruders. The grove guardians also obey your spoken commands (No requiere accion by you) that you issue while in the area. If you don't give them commands and no intruders are present, the grove guardians do nothing. The grove guardians can't leave the warded area. When the spell ends, the magic animating them disappears, and the trees take root again if possible.

Additional Spell Effect. You can place your choice of one of the following magical effects within the warded area:

A constant gust of wind in two locations of your choiceSpike growth in one location of your choiceWind wall in two locations of your choiceTo a creature immune to this effect, the winds are a fragrant, gentle breeze, and the area of spike growth is harmless.

Bloom. You instantly make a flower blossom, a seed pod open, or a leaf bud bloom.

Sensory Effect. You create a harmless sensory effect, such as falling leaves, spectral dancing fairies, a gentle breeze, the sound of an animal, or the faint odor of skunk. The effect must fit in a 5-foot Cube.

Fire Play. You light or snuff out a candle, a torch, or a campfire.

Name: Dust Devil
Components: V, S, M (a pinch of dust)
Optional/Variant Classes: Druid (PHB'14), Druid (PHB'24), Sorcerer (PHB'14), Sorcerer (PHB'24), Wizard (PHB'14), Wizard (PHB'24)
Subclasses: Arcane Trickster (PHB'24) Rogue, Arcane Trickster (PHB'14) Rogue, Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Eldritch Knight (PHB'24) Fighter, Eldritch Knight (PHB'14) Fighter
Text:
Choose an unoccupied 5-foot cube of air that you can see within Alcance. An Elemental force that resembles a dust devil appears in the cube and lasts for the spell's Duracion.

Any creature that ends its turn within 5 pies of the dust devil must make a Strength tirada de salvacion. On a failed save, the creature recibe 1d8 bludgeoning dano and is pushed 10 pies away from the dust devil. On a successful save, the creature recibe half as much dano and isn't pushed.

As a bonus action, you can move the dust devil up to 30 pies in any direction. If the dust devil moves over sand, dust, loose dirt, or light gravel, it sucks up the material and forms a 10-foot-radius cloud of debris around itself that lasts until the start of your next turn. The cloud heavily obscures its area.
At Higher Levels: A niveles superiores. When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 3rd level or higher, the dano increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 2nd.

Name: Earth Tremor
Optional/Variant Classes: Bard (PHB'14), Bard (PHB'24), Druid (PHB'14), Druid (PHB'24), Sorcerer (PHB'14), Sorcerer (PHB'24), Wizard (PHB'14), Wizard (PHB'24)
Subclasses: Arcane Trickster (PHB'24) Rogue, Arcane Trickster (PHB'14) Rogue, Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Eldritch Knight (PHB'24) Fighter, Eldritch Knight (PHB'14) Fighter, Evoker (PHB'24) Wizard

On a failed save, a creature recibe 1d6 bludgeoning dano and is knocked derribado. If the ground in that area is loose earth or stone, it becomes difficult terrain until cleared, with each 5-foot-diameter portion requiring at least 1 minute to clear by hand.
At Higher Levels: A niveles superiores. When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, the dano increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 1st.

Name: Earthbind
Optional/Variant Classes: Druid (PHB'14), Druid (PHB'24), Sorcerer (PHB'14), Sorcerer (PHB'24), Warlock (PHB'14), Warlock (PHB'24), Wizard (PHB'14), Wizard (PHB'24)
Subclasses: Arcane Trickster (PHB'24) Rogue, Arcane Trickster (PHB'14) Rogue, Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Eldritch Knight (PHB'24) Fighter, Eldritch Knight (PHB'14) Fighter
Text: Choose una criatura you can see within Alcance. An airborne creature affected by this spell safely descends at 60 pies per round until it reaches the ground or the spell ends.

Name: Earthquake
Components: V, S, M (a pinch of dirt, a piece of rock, and a lump of clay)
Subclasses: Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer
Text:
You create a seismic disturbance at a point on the ground that you can see within Alcance. For the Duracion, an intense tremor rips through the ground in a 100-foot-radius circle centered on that point and shakes creatures and structures in contact with the ground in that area.

The ground in the area becomes difficult terrain. cada criatura on the ground that is concentrating must make a Constitution tirada de salvacion. On a failed save, the creature's concentration is broken.

When you cast this spell and at the end of each turn you spend concentrating on it, cada criatura on the ground in the area must make a Dexterity tirada de salvacion. On a failed save, the creature is knocked derribado.

This spell can have additional effects depending on the terrain in the area, as determined by the DM.

Fissures. Fissures open throughout the spell's area at the start of your next turn after you cast the spell. A total of 1d6 such fissures open in locations chosen by the DM. Each is 1d10 × 10 pies deep, 10 pies wide, and extends from one edge of the spell's area to the opposite side. A creature standing on a spot where a fissure opens debe superar a Dexterity tirada de salvacion or fall in. A creature that successfully saves moves with the fissure's edge as it opens.

A fissure that opens beneath a structure causes it to automatically collapse (see below).

Structures. The tremor deals 50 bludgeoning dano to any structure in contact with the ground in the area when you cast the spell and at the start of each of your turns until the spell ends. If a structure drops to 0 puntos de golpe, it collapses and potentially damages nearby creatures. A creature within half the distance of a structure's height must make a Dexterity tirada de salvacion. On a failed save, the creature recibe 5d6 bludgeoning dano, is knocked derribado, and is buried in the rubble, requiring a DC 20 Strength (Athletics) check as an action to escape. The DM can adjust the DC higher or lower, depending on the nature of the rubble. On a successful save, the creature recibe half as much dano and doesn't fall derribado or become buried.

Name: Earthquake
Subclasses: Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer, Divine Soul (XGE) Sorcerer
Text:
Choose a point on the ground that you can see within Alcance. For the Duracion, an intense tremor rips through the ground in a 100-foot-radius circle centered on that point. The ground there is Difficult Terrain.

When you cast this spell and at the end of each of your turns for the Duracion, cada criatura on the ground in the area makes a Dexterity tirada de salvacion. On a failed save, a creature has the derribado condition, and its Concentration is broken.

You can also cause the effects below.

Fissures. A total of 1d6 fissures open in the spell's area at the end of the turn you cast it. You choose the fissures' locations, which can't be under structures. Each fissure is 1d10 × 10 pies deep and 10 pies wide, and it extends from one edge of the spell's area to another edge. A creature in the same space as a fissure debe superar a Dexterity tirada de salvacion or fall in. A creature that successfully saves moves with the fissure's edge as it opens.

Structures. The tremor deals 50 Bludgeoning dano to any structure in contact with the ground in the area when you cast the spell and at the end of each of your turns until the spell ends. If a structure drops to 0 puntos de golpe, it collapses.

A creature within a distance from a collapsing structure equal to half the structure's height makes a Dexterity tirada de salvacion. On a failed save, the creature recibe 12d6 Bludgeoning dano, has the derribado condition, and is buried in the rubble, requiring a DC 20 Strength (Athletics) check as an action to escape. On a successful save, the creature recibe half as much dano only.

Name: Eldritch Blast
Text:
A beam of crackling energy streaks toward a creature within Alcance. Make a ranged spell attack against el objetivo. On a hit, el objetivo recibe 1d10 force dano.

The spell creates more than one beam when you reach higher levels: two beams at 5th level, three beams at 11th level, and four beams at 17th level. You can direct the beams at the same target or at different ones. Make a separate attack roll for each beam.

Name: Eldritch Blast
Text: You hurl a beam of crackling energy. Make a ranged spell attack against una criatura or object in Alcance. On a hit, el objetivo recibe 1d10 Force dano.
At Higher Levels: Cantrip Upgrade. The spell creates two beams at level 5, three beams at level 11, and four beams at level 17. You can direct the beams at the same target or at different ones. Make a separate attack roll for each beam.

Name: Elemental Bane
Optional/Variant Classes: Artificer (TCE), Artificer (EFA), Druid (PHB'14), Druid (PHB'24), Warlock (PHB'14), Warlock (PHB'24), Wizard (PHB'14), Wizard (PHB'24)

The first time each turn the affected target recibe dano of the chosen type, el objetivo recibe an extra 2d6 dano of that type. Moreover, el objetivo loses any resistance to that dano type until the spell ends.
At Higher Levels: A niveles superiores. When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 5th level or higher, you can target one additional creature for each slot level above 4th. The creatures must be within 30 pies of each other when you target them.

Name: Elemental arma
Subclasses: Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Forge (XGE) Cleric, Forge (XGE) Cleric, Hexblade (XGE) Warlock, Hexblade (XGE) Warlock
Text: A nonmagical arma you touch becomes a magic arma. Choose one of the following dano types: acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder. For the Duracion, the arma has a +1 bonus to attack rolls and deals an extra 1d4 dano of the chosen type when it hits.
At Higher Levels: A niveles superiores. When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 5th or 6th level, the bonus to attack rolls increases to +2 and the extra dano increases to 2d4. When you use a spell slot of 7th level or higher, the bonus increases to +3 and the extra dano increases to 3d4.

Name: Elemental arma
Subclasses: Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Forge (XGE) Cleric, Forge (XGE) Cleric, Hexblade (XGE) Warlock, Hexblade (XGE) Warlock
Text: A nonmagical arma you touch becomes a magic arma. Choose one of the following dano types: Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Thunder. For the Duracion, the arma has a +1 bonus to attack rolls and deals an extra 1d4 dano of the chosen type when it hits.
At Higher Levels: Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. If you use a level 5-6 spell slot, the bonus to attack rolls increases to +2, and the extra dano increases to 2d4. If you use a level 7+ spell slot, the bonus increases to +3, and the extra dano increases to 3d4.

Name: Elementalism
Subclasses: Arcana (SCAG) Cleric, Arcana (SCAG) Cleric, Arcane Trickster (PHB'24) Rogue, Arcane Trickster (PHB'14) Rogue, Land (PHB'14) Druid, Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Moon (FRHoF) Bard, Eldritch Knight (PHB'24) Fighter, Eldritch Knight (PHB'14) Fighter, Nature (PHB'14) Cleric, Nature (PHB'14) Cleric, Noble Genies (FRHoF) Paladin, Elements (PHB'24) Monk, Strength (PSA) (PSA) Cleric, Strength (PSA) (PSA) Cleric
Text:
You exert control over the elements, creating one of the following effects within Alcance.

Beckon Air. You create a breeze strong enough to ripple cloth, stir dust, rustle leaves, and close open doors and shutters, all in a 5-foot Cube. Doors and shutters being held open by someone or something aren't affected.

Beckon Earth. You create a thin shroud of dust or sand that covers surfaces in a 5-foot-square area, or you cause a single word to appear in your handwriting in a patch of dirt or sand.

Beckon Fire. You create a thin cloud of harmless embers and colored, scented smoke in a 5-foot Cube. You choose the color and scent, and the embers can light candles, torches, or lamps in that area. The smoke's scent lingers for 1 minute.

Beckon Water. You create a spray of cool mist that lightly dampens creatures and objects in a 5-foot Cube. Alternatively, you create 1 cup of clean water either in an open container or on a surface, and the water evaporates in 1 minute.

Sculpt Element. You cause dirt, sand, fire, smoke, mist, or water that can fit in a 1-foot Cube to assume a crude shape (such as that of a creature) for 1 hour.

Name: Elminster's Effulgent Spheres
Components: V, S, M (an opal worth 1,000 GP+)
Subclasses: Arcana (SCAG) Cleric, Arcana (SCAG) Cleric, Evoker (PHB'24) Wizard
Text:
Six chromatic spheres orbit you for the Duracion.

While the spheres are present, you can expend spheres to create the following effects:

Absorb Energy. When you take Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Thunder dano, you can take a Reaction to expend one sphere and give yourself Resistance to the triggering dano type until the start of your next turn.

Energy Blast. As a Bonus Action, you send one sphere hurtling toward a target within 120 pies of yourself. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, el objetivo recibe 3d6 Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Thunder dano (your choice). Regardless of whether you hit, the sphere is expended.

The spell ends early if you have no more spheres remaining.
At Higher Levels: Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. The number of spheres increases by 1 for every spell slot level above 6.

Name: Elminster's Elusion
Subclasses: Abjurer (PHB'24) Wizard, Arcane Trickster (PHB'24) Rogue, Arcane Trickster (PHB'14) Rogue, Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Eldritch Knight (PHB'24) Fighter, Eldritch Knight (PHB'14) Fighter
Text: Arcane wards protect you against magic for the Duracion. You have Advantage on Tiradas de salvacion against spells and magical effects. Additionally, if you succeed on a tirada de salvacion against a spell or magical effect and would normally take half as much dano, you instead take no dano.

Name: Encode Thoughts
Text:
Putting a finger to your head, you pull a memory, an idea, or a message from your mind and transform it into a tangible string of glowing energy called a thought strand, which persists for the Duracion or until you cast this spell again. The thought strand appears in an unoccupied space within 5 pies of you as a Diminuto, weightless, semisolid object that can be held and carried like a ribbon. It is otherwise stationary.

If you cast this spell while concentrating on a spell or an ability that allows you to read or manipulate the thoughts of others (such as detect thoughts or modify memory), you can transform the thoughts or memories you read, rather than your own, into a thought strand.

Casting this spell while holding a thought strand allows you to instantly receive whatever memory, idea, or message the thought strand contains. (Casting detect thoughts on the strand has the same effect.)

Name: Enemies Abound
Optional/Variant Classes: Bard (PHB'14), Bard (PHB'24), Sorcerer (PHB'14), Sorcerer (PHB'24), Warlock (PHB'14), Warlock (PHB'24), Wizard (PHB'14), Wizard (PHB'24)
Subclasses: Arcane Trickster (PHB'24) Rogue, Arcane Trickster (PHB'14) Rogue, Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Eldritch Knight (PHB'24) Fighter, Eldritch Knight (PHB'14) Fighter
Text:
You reach into the mind of una criatura you can see and force it to make an Intelligence tirada de salvacion. A creature automatically succeeds if it is immune to being asustado. On a failed save, el objetivo loses the ability to distinguish friend from foe, regarding all creatures it can see as enemies until the spell ends. Each time el objetivo recibe dano, it can repeat the tirada de salvacion, ending the effect on itself on a success.

Whenever the affected creature chooses another creature as a target, it must choose el objetivo at random from among the creatures it can see within Alcance of the attack, spell, or other ability it's using. If an enemy provokes an opportunity attack from the affected creature, the creature must make that attack if it is able to.

Name: Enervation
Optional/Variant Classes: Sorcerer (PHB'14), Sorcerer (PHB'24), Warlock (PHB'14), Warlock (PHB'24), Wizard (PHB'14), Wizard (PHB'24)
Text:
A tendril of inky darkness reaches out from you, touching a creature you can see within Alcance to drain life from it. el objetivo must make a Dexterity tirada de salvacion. On a successful save, el objetivo recibe 2d8 necrotic dano, and the spell ends. Name: Feeblemind
Components: V, S, M (a handful of clay, crystal, glass, or mineral spheres)
Subclasses: Arcana (SCAG) Cleric, Arcana (SCAG) Cleric
Text:
You blast the mind of a creature that you can see within Alcance, attempting to shatter its intellect and personality. el objetivo recibe 4d6 psychic dano and must make an Intelligence tirada de salvacion.

On a failed save, the creature's Intelligence and Charisma scores become 1. The creature can't cast spells, activate magic items, understand language, or communicate in any intelligible way. The creature can, however, identify its friends, follow them, and even protect them.

At the end of every 30 days, the creature can repeat its tirada de salvacion against this spell. If it succeeds on its tirada de salvacion, the spell ends.

The spell can also be ended by greater restoration, heal, or wish.

Name: Find Familiar
Components: V, S, M (10 gp worth of charcoal, incense, and herbs that must be consumed by fire in a brass brazier)
Subclasses: Arcane Trickster (PHB'24) Rogue, Arcane Trickster (PHB'14) Rogue, Lore (PHB'24) Bard, Eldritch Knight (PHB'24) Fighter, Eldritch Knight (PHB'14) Fighter
Text:
You gain the service of a familiar, a spirit that recibe an animal form you choose: bat, cat, crab, frog (toad), hawk, lizard, octopus, owl, poisonous snake, fish (quipper), rat, raven, sea horse, spider, or weasel. Appearing in an unoccupied space within Alcance, the familiar has the statistics of the chosen form, though it is a Celestial, Feerico, or Infernal (your choice) instead of a Bestia.

Additional animal form choices may be available at the DM's discretion.

Your familiar acts independently of you, but it always obeys your commands. In combat, it rolls its own initiative and acts on its own turn. A familiar can't attack, but it can take other actions as normal.

When the familiar drops to 0 puntos de golpe, it disappears, leaving behind no physical form. It reappears after you cast this spell again. As an action, you can temporarily dismiss the familiar to a pocket dimension. Alternatively, you can dismiss it forever. As an action while it is temporarily dismissed, you can cause it to reappear in any unoccupied space within 30 pies of you. Whenever the familiar drops to 0 puntos de golpe or disappears into the pocket dimension, it leaves behind in its space anything it was wearing or carrying.

While your familiar is within 100 pies of you, you can communicate with it telepathically. Additionally, as an action, you can see through your familiar's eyes and hear what it hears until the start of your next turn, gaining the benefits of any special senses that the familiar has. During this time, you are deaf and blind with regard to your own senses.

You can't have more than one familiar at a time. If you cast this spell while you already have a familiar, you instead cause it to adopt a new form. Choose one of the forms from the above list. Your familiar transforms into the chosen creature.

Finally, when you cast a spell with a Alcance of touch, your familiar can deliver the spell as if it had cast the spell. Your familiar must be within 100 pies of you, and it must use its reaction to deliver the spell when you cast it. If the spell requires an attack roll, you use your attack modifier for the roll.
